import React from "react"; function Products() { const products = [ { id: 101, name: "Wireless Mouse", category: "Peripherals", total: 50, current: 23 }, { id: 102, name: "Keyboard", category: "Peripherals", total: 40, current: 3 }, { id: 103, name: "USB Hub", category: "Accessories", total: 30, current: 4 }, { id: 104, name: "HDMI Cable", category: "Cables", total: 100, current: 67 }, { id: 105, name: "Monitor Stand", category: "Furniture", total: 20, current: 5 }, { id: 106, name: "Laptop Stand", category: "Furniture", total: 35, current: 18 }, { id: 107, name: "Webcam", category: "Electronics", total: 25, current: 12 }, ]; const lowStockCount = products.filter((item) => item.current <= 5).length; const inStockCount = products.filter((item) => item.current > 5).length; return (
{/* Header */}

Products

Manage product inventory and monitor stock availability

{/* Search + Filter */}
{/* Summary Cards */}

Total Products

{products.length}

Low Stock

{lowStockCount}

In Stock

{inStockCount}

{/* Table */}

Product Inventory

{products.map((item) => { const low = item.current <= 5; return ( ); })}
ID Product Category Total Qty Available Status
{item.id} {item.name} {item.category} {item.total} {item.current} {low ? "Low Stock" : "Available"}
); } export default Products;
